subcodes.first_line: O servant! Thy letter hath come and the servant hath made mention thereof before My face. Blessed art thou, inasmuch as thy letter was pure [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا غلام کتابت حاضر و عبد حاضر تلقاء وجه ذکر نمود طوبی لک چه که کتابت مطهر بود
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the power of words; of speech, @love of God
